description_long: This is a modern two-story house set on a landscaped lot with a driveway, garage, and lush green lawns. The house features a flat roof, large windows, and a clean, geometric facade, surrounded by mature trees and shrubbery. The front entryway is defined by a paved path leading to a covered porch, with a garage adjacent to the main entrance. The backyard includes a patio area and a swimming pool, with additional garden space and outdoor seating. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes open space, outdoor living, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, garage, and landscaped yard featuring a pool and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and manicured front lawn with several trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and more densely clustered trees.
description_view_2: Back view with the house partially obscured by trees, showing the rear facade and garden area.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the garage, driveway, and a clear view of the pool and patio in the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, modern door, adjacent garage, and paved walkway
